tasks.title: Universal Attribution Foundation
tasks.description: Build universal attribution-aware API and UI foundation that works for all future reports (Financial, Marketing, etc.). Implement Attribution by dropdown (FTD Date/Registration Date) in General Filters tab and create /api/universal/filter-options endpoint with dynamic GROUP BY field selection for signUpDate vs firstDepositDate.
tasks.testStrategy: User test: Attribution dropdown appears in General tab, API returns different data based on attribution parameter

subtasks.title: Create Universal API Structure
subtasks.description: Create /api/universal/filter-options/route.ts endpoint with comprehensive error handling, loading states, and real data validation. Implement universal filter types (partners, campaigns, countries, os, params) with TypeScript interfaces. Include edge case handling for missing data, empty results, and invalid parameters. Add performance optimization and proper error responses. Target: 120 lines, 2 files, 2 hours.

subtasks.title: Add Attribution SQL Logic
subtasks.description: Add attribution parameter support to universal API with real data validation. Implement dynamic date field selection: signUpDate vs firstDepositDate with edge case handling (missing dates, null values). Modify SQL query builder in cohort-sql.ts for GROUP BY field switching. Include performance testing with actual data and error handling for SQL failures. Target: 100 lines, 2 files, 2 hours.

subtasks.title: Attribution Filter UI with States
subtasks.description: Add Attribution by dropdown to General Filters tab with loading states, error handling, and empty states. Options: [FTD Date, Registration Date]. Implement skeleton loaders during API calls, error messages for failed requests, and proper accessibility. Integrate with URL params and filter state management. Include responsive design for mobile. Target: 120 lines, 3 files, 2 hours.

tasks.title: Fix Filter System and Add Params
tasks.description: Fix broken cascading filters (Partner → Campaign → Country) and add third Params tab with tagOs, tagSource, tagSub2, tagWebId filters. Implement working cascading with attribution support through universal API.
tasks.testStrategy: User test: Select partner → campaigns dropdown shows only that partner's campaigns. Third Params tab visible with tag filters working.

subtasks.title: Fix Cascading Filters with States
subtasks.description: Debug and fix Partner → Campaign → Country cascading via universal API with comprehensive error handling. Implement proper loading states during cascading requests, empty states when no options found, and error recovery mechanisms. Add debouncing and performance optimization. Include real data validation with edge cases like missing campaigns for selected partners. Target: 130 lines, 3 files, 2.5 hours.

subtasks.title: Params Filter Tab with States
subtasks.description: Add third Params tab with tagOs, tagSource, tagSub2, tagWebId autocomplete filters. Implement loading states, empty states ('No tags found'), error handling, and responsive design. Extend universal API to support params with attribution and real data validation. Include accessibility features and mobile optimization. Handle edge cases like missing tag data and null values. Target: 140 lines, 3 files, 2.5 hours.

tasks.title: Real DEP2COST Implementation
tasks.description: Replace mock data with real DEP2COST calculations using attribution-aware CohortProcessor. Implement formula: sum(depositsSum) / sum(fixedPerPlayer) per breakpoint with attribution-based grouping and percentage formatting.
tasks.testStrategy: User test: Apply filters with different attribution → see different cohort groupings. DEP2COST tab shows percentages, attribution switching changes results.

subtasks.title: Fix CohortProcessor with Validation
subtasks.description: Uncomment CohortProcessor code with comprehensive error handling and real data validation. Debug compilation errors, add loading states for data processing, implement error recovery mechanisms, and validate with actual database queries. Include performance benchmarks and edge case handling for missing player data, invalid dates, and empty datasets. Add proper logging and monitoring. Target: 130 lines, 2 files, 2.5 hours.

subtasks.title: Attribution Logic Integration
subtasks.description: Integrate attribution logic with CohortProcessor including real data validation and error handling. Implement dynamic GROUP BY field selection with edge case handling for null dates, missing attribution data, and invalid parameters. Add performance monitoring, proper error logging, and validation with actual database queries. Include fallback mechanisms for data inconsistencies. Target: 120 lines, 2 files, 2.5 hours.

subtasks.title: DEP2COST Calculations with Validation
subtasks.description: Implement DEP2COST formula with real data validation: sum(depositsSum) / sum(fixedPerPlayer) per breakpoint. Add comprehensive error handling for division by zero, missing financial data, and edge cases. Implement loading states for calculations, empty states for no data periods, and percentage formatting. Include performance optimization and validation with actual data. Support day/week breakpoints with proper error recovery. Target: 140 lines, 3 files, 2.5 hours.

tasks.title: Universal System Validation and Deploy
tasks.description: End-to-end testing of attribution with all filter combinations. Validate universal API works for cohort report type. Performance optimization and deployment preparation. Document attribution integration pattern for future reports.
tasks.testStrategy: User test: Switch attribution → all data recalculates correctly. Complete flow: open cohorts → apply multiple filters → see updated DEP2COST data.

subtasks.title: End-to-End Validation Testing
subtasks.description: Comprehensive end-to-end testing with real data validation. Test all filter combinations, attribution switching, edge cases (empty data, invalid dates), error scenarios, and performance benchmarks. Validate loading states, empty states, error recovery, and mobile responsiveness. Include accessibility testing and cross-browser validation. Document all test cases and performance metrics. Target: 100 lines test code, 2 hours.

subtasks.title: Production Readiness and Polish
subtasks.description: Final production readiness with comprehensive optimization and validation. Performance tuning, error monitoring setup, production error handling, loading state optimization, and empty state polish. Create deployment documentation, demo preparation materials, and attribution integration guide for future reports. Include final accessibility audit and mobile optimization. Target: 80 lines optimization code, 2 hours.
